title: Provena: Reproducibility Package for Evidence-Laundering Stress Tests in AI Governance Audits
description: Computational companion to the manuscript 'Preventing Evidence Laundering in AI Governance Audits: A Provenance-Bounded Framework for Context-Conditioned Evidence Sufficiency'. Implements the Provena epistemic-ceiling framework in Python and validates it through five computational studies on synthetic audit profiles under two data generators (uniform and context-correlated). Includes all 9 auditing baselines, deterministic seeds, generated validation outputs (validation_results.json with manuscript_tables block), generated results audit (GENERATED_RESULTS_AUDIT.md), sample worked-example demonstrators, and supplementary materials (six sections: formal notation, evidence-family definitions, input-mode quality rubric, normalization templates, artifact schema, repo manifest).
